race.comment: COSTA STAR (7) was on the quick turnaround here last start when beaten 2.6L after getting a long way back in the run. Out to 1600m now looks a good move though and her recent form stacks right up. Can land the knockout blow this time. THE SESSIONE (4) felt the pinch late last start when sitting up front at this track. Riordan remains in the irons and he draws better this time. Out to this trip now can see him improve and a better run is on the cards. SWISHGOBANGO (1) has been racing well and is close to a win, the latest effort a solid third at this track over 1400m. Another big run is expected. WILLYABRUP (3) missed the placings two runs back then didn't do any better last start when ninth over 1200m at this track. Well placed and can figure in the finish this time. ALL KING'S (2) jumped favourite in the race a number of these come through when disappointing. Can bounce back in a big way.
